audit_status.source_base: Greek 1 John text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for children of Divine, sin/lawlessness, Cain, love in action, confidence, commandment.

verses.restored: See what kind of love the Father has given to us, that we should be called children of Divine; and we are. Because of this the world-system does not know us, because it did not know him.
Beloved, now we are children of Divine, and it has not yet been manifested what we will be. We know that if he is manifested, we will be like him, because we will see him just as he is.
And everyone having this hope upon him purifies oneself, just as that one is pure.
Everyone doing sin/misalignment also does lawlessness, and sin/misalignment is lawlessness.
And you know that he was manifested so that he might take away sins/misalignments, and sin/misalignment is not in him.
Everyone remaining in him does not keep sinning/misaligning; everyone continuing in sin/misalignment has neither seen him nor known him.
Little children, let no one lead you astray; the one doing righteousness/justice is righteous/just, just as that one is righteous/just.

The one doing sin/misalignment is from the adversarial one, because the adversarial one sins/misaligns from beginning. For this the Son of Divine was manifested, so that he might dissolve the works of the adversarial one.
Everyone having been born of Divine does not keep doing sin/misalignment, because his seed remains in that one; and one is not able to keep sinning/misaligning, because one has been born of Divine.
In this the children of Divine and the children of the adversarial one are manifest: everyone not doing righteousness/justice is not from Divine, and the one not loving one's sibling.
Because this is the message you heard from beginning: that we should love one another,
not as Cain, who was from the harmful one and slaughtered his sibling. And because of what did he slaughter him? Because his works were harmful, but those of his sibling righteous/just.
Do not marvel, siblings, if the world-system hates you.
We know that we have passed from death into life, because we love the siblings. The one not loving remains in death.
Everyone hating one's sibling is a murderer, and you know that every murderer does not have age-long life remaining in oneself.
In this we have known love: that one laid down his life for us; and we ought to lay down lives for the siblings.
But whoever has the life-supplies of the world and sees one's sibling having need and shuts inward affections from that one, how does the love of the Divine remain in that one?
Little children, let us not love in word nor in tongue, but in work and truth.
In this we will know that we are from truth, and before him we will persuade our heart,
because if our heart condemns us, the Divine is greater than our heart and knows all things.
Beloved, if the heart does not condemn us, we have boldness toward the Divine,
and whatever we ask we receive from him, because we keep his commands and do the pleasing things before him.
And this is his command: that we trust the name of his Son Jesus Messiah and love one another, just as he gave command to us.
And the one keeping his commands remains in him, and he in that one; and by this we know that he remains in us, from the Spirit whom he gave us.

translation_notes: Born of Divine language concerns ongoing identity and practice; avoid perfectionist abuse while preserving the ethical force.
Love is materially tested by whether one opens inward affection and resources to siblings in need.
Divine is greater than our condemning heart: important pastoral safeguard against scrupulosity.
